meaning: adj.(基督教) 三位一体的,三位一体说的,信仰三位一体的n.信仰三位一体教理的人
examples: It introduces us into the intimacy of the Trinitarian life.
Both creation and redemption are Trinitarian in character and operation.
Osteoporosis is one of the main direction in our department, after more than ten years continuously in-depth study, we already have the trinitarian system of diagnosis, treatment and rehabilitation.
